title: Discrete Mathematics_ Set Theory & Algebra - Partial Order - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
The less-than relation, \( <, \) on real number is



GATE CSE 1993 | Question: 8.5
options: a partial ordering since it is asymmetric and reflexive
a partial ordering since it is antisymmetric and reflexive
not a partial ordering because it is not asymmetric and not reflexive
not a partial ordering because it is not antisymmetric and reflexive
